acceptance_targets: [chapter_12_f005] PASS if revised chapter keeps no more than one explicit 'smelled like' construction across those cited beats and each replacement line links sensory detail to immediate character action or appraisal. FAIL if three parallel smell-template sentences remain.

[chapter_12_f006] PASS if revised opening contains no run longer than 9 consecutive paragraphs without Ina interiority before the locker reveal, and at least three inserted interior beats are visible in the cited span. FAIL if exterior-only sequencing still dominates that block.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised chapter keeps no more than one explicit 'smelled like' construction across those cited beats and each replacement line links sensory detail to immediate character action or appraisal. FAIL if three parallel smell-template sentences remain.
findings.problem: A recurring sensory sentence formula ('smelled like ...') appears more than twice, creating detectable prose autopilot.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace at least two of the repeated smell constructions at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:5, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:33, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:295 with varied sensory syntax tied to action or pressure in the same beat.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised opening contains no run longer than 9 consecutive paragraphs without Ina interiority before the locker reveal, and at least three inserted interior beats are visible in the cited span. FAIL if exterior-only sequencing still dominates that block.
findings.problem: The opening runs for 10+ consecutive paragraphs before sustained focal interiority appears, producing a screenplay-like exterior block before the chapter's psychological engine engages.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the opening stretch anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:7 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:29, add brief interior beats (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) to puncture external blocking before the first explicit memory beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:31.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when stakes demand it: show coercion mechanics, sexual negotiation, grief rituals, and financial desperation at scene level. In edge cases, prefer precision over decorum; protect character dignity through perspective accuracy, not by omitting the hard material.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene requires bodily, economic, or moral consequence and the draft retreats into abstract phrasing, rewrite with concrete action, sensation, and decision impact before proceeding.
aesthetic_risk_policy.operational_resolution_rule: When uncertain between tasteful distance and narrative truth, choose the version that preserves causal accountability and embodied consequence, then tune language for clarity rather than softness.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for deliberate emphasis, legal language, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter structures deliberately: high-density dialogue vs interior reflection, multi-scene public collision vs two-scene intimate pressure, aftermath inventory vs anticipatory dread. Never let two consecutive chapters share the same pacing architecture or turn mechanism.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsentimental literary diction that permits technical vocabulary, profanity, and class-marked speech without flattening idiolects.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person centered on Seo Ina, with brief controlled widenings in public-event chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternating pressure waves: compressed clauses in operational stress, longer breath-based lines in grief and reflection.
